name: apple-productivity
description: Access Apple Mail and Reminders through local macOS apps, with Calendar planned next.

interface.shortDescription: Use Apple Mail and Reminders from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use local macOS Apple apps from Codex, including Apple Mail account discovery, live search, RAG-style context retrieval, reading, composing, sending, archiving, and moving messages to trash, plus Apple Reminders list discovery, search, reading, creating, updating, completing, deleting, and moving reminders with guarded write behavior.
defaultPrompt: Find useful context from my Apple Mail
Draft a reply in Apple Mail
Create a reminder for this task
